history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3 upgrade changed ResponseEntity.getStatusCode() return type from HttpStatus to HttpStatusCode, causing incompatible types compilation errors in UCSBCurriculumService.java
history.qwen_rationale: The observation library match identifies that Spring 6 widened ResponseEntity.getStatusCode() return type. The fix is to fold the WidenHttpStatusToHttpStatusCode recipe into the sb3_upgrade step so it runs alongside the Spring Boot 3 upgrade, widening the LHS type declarations from HttpStatus to HttpStatusCode before compilation fails.
